emails.subject: New CTPY Name Request
emails.body: New CTPY Name Request Because I'm not quite sure who to direct this request to, I'm e-mailing everyone I think might be involved in entering new counterparty names. One of our mid-marketers has executed a deal with Sierra Pacific Holding Company, which is a new counterparty name and needs to be added as a choice in Enpower. Please let me know if I've contacted the correct people, and if I've contacted the incorrect people. (Sorry!) Thanks, Kate Symes Trading Support 503-464-7486

emails.subject: Re: New CTPY Name Request
emails.body: Re: New CTPY Name Request Kate, I have forward your request to Samuel Schott in Global Counterparty. He can be reached at 713-853-9890. If I can be of further service, please call me. wlh
